name: Acme Manufacturing
description: Enterprise customer since 2024. CFO Beth Turner is key decision maker - highly price-sensitive and always negotiates. Strong product adoption with 50k+ records imported. Renewal discussions typically require ROI documentation.

name: Beta Tech Solutions
description: B2B SaaS company in UK. CEO Omar is metrics-driven and needs data for every decision. Lisa Ng is our internal champion pushing for expansion to marketing team. Low activity flag due to recent team changes.

name: Crown Foods
description: Canadian food distributor with 5 warehouse locations. Maria Silva runs operations and makes quick decisions. Heavy API user for inventory integration. Mobile app performance has been a recent concern.

name: Delta Health Clinics
description: Healthcare provider with 3 clinic locations. Erin Cho champions expansion but needs board approval. HIPAA compliance is critical - audit logging enhancement in progress. Expansion opportunity for 3 additional clinics.

name: Eastern Travel Co.
description: Travel agency network in India with 200+ agents. Currently in trial phase. Main concern is agent adoption - resistance to change from legacy Sabre workflows. Sanjay (owner) is interested but cautious about rollout.

name: Fusion Retail Group
description: German retail chain with stores across EU. Lars (CTO) reviews all contracts carefully. Emma Khan is our champion driving expansion for 25 new store openings. Strong relationship with 2-year contract locked in.

name: Green Energy Partners
description: Former customer who churned due to budget cuts from solar division losses. Carlos expressed interest in returning after Q4 budget cycle. Good product fit but timing was wrong. Win-back candidate.

name: Harbor Logistics
description: Logistics company focused on port operations. Jacob Wu is driving implementation and wants go-live before Q2 shipping surge. New customer with high potential - dedicated CSM assigned for implementation success.
